title: Beyond the State’s Business Class: Why Kerala’s Bus Permit Regime Needs Retirement
description: The Kerala State Road Transport Corporation’s announcement of “Business Class” Volvo services on the Kochi–Thiruvananthapuram corridor is, in one sense, a candid admission. The state has conceded what commuters have known for years: public transit in Kerala is failing travellers. […] The post Beyond the State’s Business Class: Why Kerala’s Bus Permit Regime Needs Retirement appeared first on Centre for Public Policy Research (CPPR).
